stem: Lines L and k are parallel, and line j is a transversal that intersects both. Line j makes an angle of 72° with line k. The same-side interior angle on line L measures a°. What is the value of a?
rationale: Choice B is correct. Same-side interior angles formed by parallel lines cut by a transversal are supplementary, so a + 72 = 180, giving a = 108.
